turns.svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="sky" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#aee1ff"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#e6f6ff"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="ground" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#2f8a2f"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#1f6b1f"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="soft" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="1.2"/>
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <!-- sky -->
  <rect width="512" height="360" fill="url(#sky)"/>

  <!-- distant tree silhouettes -->
  <g opacity="0.65">
    <g transform="translate(40,220)">
      <polygon points="0,120 40,0 80,120" fill="#1f6b1f"/>
      <polygon points="-8,96 40,-12 88,96" fill="#166017"/>
      <rect x="34" y="120" width="12" height="40" rx="3" fill="#6b4225"/>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(140,200) scale(0.9)">
      <polygon points="0,140 50,0 100,140" fill="#235f1f"/>
      <polygon points="-10,110 50,-10 110,110" fill="#1a5a1a"/>
      <rect x="44" y="140" width="14" height="46" rx="3" fill="#754b2b"/>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(380,210) scale(1.05)">
      <polygon points="0,125 45,0 90,125" fill="#2a7628"/>
      <polygon points="-9,100 45,-15 99,100" fill="#19601a"/>
      <rect x="36" y="125" width="12" height="42" rx="3" fill="#5f3a24"/>
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- ground -->
  <rect y="360" width="512" height="152" fill="url(#ground)"/>
  <!-- distant treeline shapes on ground -->
  <g transform="translate(0,330)" opacity="0.9">
    <ellipse cx="60" cy="60" rx="60" ry="20" fill="#255e1f"/>
    <ellipse cx="180" cy="50" rx="80" ry="26" fill="#2a6e22"/>
    <ellipse cx="360" cy="58" rx="100" ry="30" fill="#225d20"/>
    <ellipse cx="480" cy="62" rx="60" ry="22" fill="#27621f"/>
  </g>

  <!-- foreground trees (varied) -->
  <!-- left cluster -->
  <g>
    <g transform="translate(60,260)">
      <circle cx="20" cy="-10" r="36" fill="#3aa33a" filter="url(#soft)"/>
      <circle cx="54" cy="6" r="30" fill="#2f9b2f"/>
      <circle cx="-6" cy="6" r="28" fill="#2c8f2c"/>
      <rect x="18" y="40" width="12" height="52" rx="3" fill="#8a5531"/>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(120,240)">
      <polygon points="0,120 45,0 90,120" fill="#2e8a2e"/>
      <polygon points="-6,94 45,-8 96,94" fill="#1f6b1f"/>
      <rect x="36" y="120" width="14" height="50" rx="3" fill="#6b3f26"/>
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- center dense cluster -->
  <g>
    <g transform="translate(220,220)">
      <polygon points="0,150 60,0 120,150" fill="#3aa33a"/>
      <polygon points="-10,120 60,-20 130,120" fill="#2f9b2f"/>
      <polygon points="-18,96 60,-44 138,96" fill="#247a23"/>
      <rect x="54" y="150" width="16" height="62" rx="3" fill="#7a4529"/>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(180,260) scale(0.85)">
      <circle cx="20" cy="-10" r="34" fill="#2f9b2f"/>
      <circle cx="54" cy="6" r="28" fill="#2b8f2b"/>
      <rect x="26" y="40" width="12" height="48" rx="3" fill="#6b4026"/>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(280,250) scale(0.9)">
      <polygon points="0,130 50,0 100,130" fill="#2a7d2a"/>
      <polygon points="-8,100 50,-12 108,100" fill="#225d20"/>
      <rect x="44" y="130" width="12" height="48" rx="3" fill="#5e3a22"/>
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- right cluster -->
  <g>
    <g transform="translate(360,240)">
      <circle cx="20" cy="-6" r="40" fill="#3bb43b"/>
      <circle cx="56" cy="10" r="32" fill="#2f9b2f"/>
      <rect x="30" y="48" width="14" height="56" rx="3" fill="#7b4529"/>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(430,260) scale(0.95)">
      <polygon points="0,120 45,0 90,120" fill="#2b8f2b"/>
      <polygon points="-6,96 45,-8 96,96" fill="#19601a"/>
      <rect x="36" y="120" width="12" height="46" rx="3" fill="#623a24"/>
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- foreground ground details (mounds) -->
  <g fill="#1e621c" opacity="0.95">
    <ellipse cx="120" cy="420" rx="80" ry="34"/>
    <ellipse cx="320" cy="440" rx="140" ry="50"/>
    <ellipse cx="440" cy="410" rx="70" ry="26"/>
  </g>

  <!-- subtle canopy overlap shadows -->
  <g opacity="0.12" fill="#000">
    <ellipse cx="240" cy="240" rx="140" ry="18"/>
  </g>
</svg>

messages.content:
You are a drawing agent in a one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: svg.

Rules:
1) Draw the target word using only SVG graphics.
2) Output one complete <svg>...</svg> string.
3) Do not include text labels, letters, or numbers in the drawing.
4) Keep the SVG simple and valid. No scripts, no foreignObject.
5) Use a 512x512 canvas.

Output schema:
{ "svg": "string" }

message.content:
{
  "svg": "<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="sky" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#aee1ff"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#e6f6ff"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="ground" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#2f8a2f"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#1f6b1f"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="soft" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="1.2"/>
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <!-- sky -->
  <rect width="512" height="360" fill="url(#sky)"/>

  <!-- distant tree silhouettes -->
  <g opacity="0.65">
    <g transform="translate(40,220)">
      <polygon points="0,120 40,0 80,120" fill="#1f6b1f"/>
      <polygon points="-8,96 40,-12 88,96" fill="#166017"/>
      <rect x="34" y="120" width="12" height="40" rx="3" fill="#6b4225"/>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(140,200) scale(0.9)">
      <polygon points="0,140 50,0 100,140" fill="#235f1f"/>
      <polygon points="-10,110 50,-10 110,110" fill="#1a5a1a"/>
      <rect x="44" y="140" width="14" height="46" rx="3" fill="#754b2b"/>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(380,210) scale(1.05)">
      <polygon points="0,125 45,0 90,125" fill="#2a7628"/>
      <polygon points="-9,100 45,-15 99,100" fill="#19601a"/>
      <rect x="36" y="125" width="12" height="42" rx="3" fill="#5f3a24"/>
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- ground -->
  <rect y="360" width="512" height="152" fill="url(#ground)"/>
  <!-- distant treeline shapes on ground -->
  <g transform="translate(0,330)" opacity="0.9">
    <ellipse cx="60" cy="60" rx="60" ry="20" fill="#255e1f"/>
    <ellipse cx="180" cy="50" rx="80" ry="26" fill="#2a6e22"/>
    <ellipse cx="360" cy="58" rx="100" ry="30" fill="#225d20"/>
    <ellipse cx="480" cy="62" rx="60" ry="22" fill="#27621f"/>
  </g>

  <!-- foreground trees (varied) -->
  <!-- left cluster -->
  <g>
    <g transform="translate(60,260)">
      <circle cx="20" cy="-10" r="36" fill="#3aa33a" filter="url(#soft)"/>
      <circle cx="54" cy="6" r="30" fill="#2f9b2f"/>
      <circle cx="-6" cy="6" r="28" fill="#2c8f2c"/>
      <rect x="18" y="40" width="12" height="52" rx="3" fill="#8a5531"/>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(120,240)">
      <polygon points="0,120 45,0 90,120" fill="#2e8a2e"/>
      <polygon points="-6,94 45,-8 96,94" fill="#1f6b1f"/>
      <rect x="36" y="120" width="14" height="50" rx="3" fill="#6b3f26"/>
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- center dense cluster -->
  <g>
    <g transform="translate(220,220)">
      <polygon points="0,150 60,0 120,150" fill="#3aa33a"/>
      <polygon points="-10,120 60,-20 130,120" fill="#2f9b2f"/>
      <polygon points="-18,96 60,-44 138,96" fill="#247a23"/>
      <rect x="54" y="150" width="16" height="62" rx="3" fill="#7a4529"/>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(180,260) scale(0.85)">
      <circle cx="20" cy="-10" r="34" fill="#2f9b2f"/>
      <circle cx="54" cy="6" r="28" fill="#2b8f2b"/>
      <rect x="26" y="40" width="12" height="48" rx="3" fill="#6b4026"/>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(280,250) scale(0.9)">
      <polygon points="0,130 50,0 100,130" fill="#2a7d2a"/>
      <polygon points="-8,100 50,-12 108,100" fill="#225d20"/>
      <rect x="44" y="130" width="12" height="48" rx="3" fill="#5e3a22"/>
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- right cluster -->
  <g>
    <g transform="translate(360,240)">
      <circle cx="20" cy="-6" r="40" fill="#3bb43b"/>
      <circle cx="56" cy="10" r="32" fill="#2f9b2f"/>
      <rect x="30" y="48" width="14" height="56" rx="3" fill="#7b4529"/>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(430,260) scale(0.95)">
      <polygon points="0,120 45,0 90,120" fill="#2b8f2b"/>
      <polygon points="-6,96 45,-8 96,96" fill="#19601a"/>
      <rect x="36" y="120" width="12" height="46" rx="3" fill="#623a24"/>
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- foreground ground details (mounds) -->
  <g fill="#1e621c" opacity="0.95">
    <ellipse cx="120" cy="420" rx="80" ry="34"/>
    <ellipse cx="320" cy="440" rx="140" ry="50"/>
    <ellipse cx="440" cy="410" rx="70" ry="26"/>
  </g>

  <!-- subtle canopy overlap shadows -->
  <g opacity="0.12" fill="#000">
    <ellipse cx="240" cy="240" rx="140" ry="18"/>
  </g>
</svg>"
}
message.reasoning:
**Planning SVG Positioning**

I’m working on positioning my elements: the left cluster at x 70, center at x 256, and right at x 430, with 9-12 trees layered in front and back. I want to create small paths but avoid text. Making silhouettes with subtle shadows sounds good. I’ll craft an SVG string and embed it into JSON, being careful to escape double quotes and avoid newlines that break the JSON. The first step is creating gradient backgrounds for the sky and ground.**Creating Broadleaf Groups**

I need to craft multiple groups for the broadleaf trees. I’ll use overlapping circles for the canopy and a rectangle for the trunk, avoiding any text or numbers in the shapes. I should make sure that the root JSON includes the SVG string and escape the double quotes correctly. I plan to create a compact multi-line string for clarity, which will help keep everything organized. It's time to start producing those shapes!

messages.content:
You are the guesser in a visual one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: guesses.

Rules:
1) You receive one JPEG image of a drawing.
2) Return exactly 20 one-word guesses in order of confidence (best guess first).
3) The order is important and will be scored by first correct position.
4) Do not repeat guesses.
5) Each guess must be EN-US one word, no spaces.
6) Avoid punctuation and numbers.

Output schema:
{ "guesses": ["string", "... exactly 20 items ..."] }
